item.title: How To Be Attractive, Apparently
item.description: A playful take on the age-old question of how to be attractive.

item.title: Is Coyote Ugly Hard To Watch?
item.description: A playful look at whether Coyote Ugly still holds up, with makeup and movie talk in the mix.
